lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਬੈਸੰਤਰਿ ਧਾਤੁ ਸੁਧੁ ਹੋਇ ਤਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jiau baisantar dhaat sudh hoe tiau har kaa bhau duramat mail gavaae |
lines.english: As fire purifies metal, so does the Fear of the Lord eradicate the filth of evil-mindedness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਜੋ ਰਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak te jan sohane jo rate har rang laae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, beautiful are those humble beings, who are imbued with the Lord's Love. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਰਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਤਾ ਬਨਿਆ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee raam man vasiaa taa baniaa seegaar |
lines.english: In Raamkalee, I have enshrined the Lord in my mind; thus I have been embellished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਬਿਗਸਿਆ ਤਾ ਸਉਪਿਆ ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad kamal bigasiaa taa saupiaa bhagat bhanddaar |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, my heart-lotus has blossomed forth; the Lord blessed me with the treasure of devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੁ ਗਇਆ ਤਾ ਜਾਗਿਆ ਚੂਕਾ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bharam geaa taa jaagiaa chookaa agiaan andhaar |
lines.english: My doubt was dispelled, and I woke up; the darkness of ignorance was dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਰਵੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤੀ ਨਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa ravai pir aapanaa sobhaavantee naar |
lines.english: Such a beautiful, happy soul-bride enjoys her Husband Lord forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਰੂਪੁ ਅਤਿ ਅਗਲਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis no roop at agalaa jis har naal piaar |
lines.english: She who is in love with her Lord, is the most infinitely beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਿਤ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin har bhagatee seegaar kareh nit jameh hoe khuaar |
lines.english: Those who decorate themselves without devotional worship to the Lord, are continually reincarnated to suffer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਜਾਸਨਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਭੁ ਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh seegaar na jaananee jaasan janam sabh haar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not know how to decorate themselves; wasting their whole lives, they depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਦੁਹੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਹੈ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak sachaa ek hai duhu vich hai sansaar |
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Lord is the One and only; duality exists only in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੈਸਾਰੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੋਭ ਨ ਪਾਇਨੀ ਅਗੈ ਜਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saisaarai vich sobh na paaeinee agai ji kare su jaanai karataar |
lines.english: They do not obtain respect in this world; the Creator Lord alone knows what will happen to them in the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਗੈ ਮੰਦੈ ਆਪਿ ਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਸੋ ਕਰਨਿ ਜਿ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: changai mandai aap laaeian so karan ji aap karaae karataar |2|
lines.english: He Himself enjoins them to good and bad; they do only that which the Creator Lord causes them to do. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਦੂਜੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve saant na aavee doojee naahee jaae |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, tranquility is not obtained. It cannot be found anywhere else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਬਹੁਤੇਰਾ ਲੋਚੀਐ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: je bahuteraa locheeai vin karamaa paaeaa na jaae |
lines.english: No matter how much one may long for it, without the karma of good actions, it cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਚੁਕਈ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tin jaman maran na chukee haumai vich dukh paae |
lines.english: The cycle of birth and death is not ended, and filled with egotism, they suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar lobh vikaar hai doojai bhaae khuaae |
lines.english: Those whose inner beings are filled with greed and corruption, are ruined through the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਤਲਬ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਨਾ ਓਇ ਦੁਖ ਸਹਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tin jam kee talab na hovee naa oe dukh sahaeh |
lines.english: They are not summoned by the Messenger of Death, and they do not suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ਸੋ ਖਾਲੀ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee satigur siau chit laaeaa so khaalee koee naeh |
lines.english: Those who focus their consciousness on the True Guru, do not remain unfulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh ubare sachai sabad samaeh |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh is saved, merging in the True Word of the Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਹੋਰਿ ਧੰਧੈ ਸਭਿ ਧਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: aap alipat sadaa rahai hor dhandhai sabh dhaaveh |
lines.english: He Himself remains unattached forever; all others run after worldly affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa har dhiaaeeai guramukh sukh paaveh |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord forever and ever, the Gurmukh finds peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਅਚਲੁ ਹੈ ਹੋਰਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: aap nihachal achal hai hor aaveh jaaveh |
lines.english: He Himself is eternal, unchanging and unmoving; the others continue coming and going in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: sachaa gahir ganbheer hai gur sabad bujhaaee |8|
lines.english: The True Lord is profound and unfathomable; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is understood. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚਿ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਮਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar vaasaa paaeeai sach sifat samaaveh |
lines.english: He dwells in the home of his own inner being, absorbed in the Praise of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਸਭੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa naam dhiaae too sabho varatai sach |
lines.english: Meditate on the True Name; the True Lord is all-pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮੈ ਜੋ ਬੁਝੈ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ਸਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak hukamai jo bujhai so fal paae sach |
lines.english: O Nanak, one who realizes the Hukam of the Lord's Command, obtains the fruit of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਨੀ ਬਦਨੀ ਕਰਤਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ਸਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: kathanee badanee karataa firai hukam na boojhai sach |
lines.english: One who merely mouths the words, does not understand the Hukam of the True Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨੇ ਸੋ ਭਗਤੁ ਹੋਇ ਵਿਣੁ ਮੰਨੇ ਕਚੁ ਨਿਕਚੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak har kaa bhaanaa mane so bhagat hoe vin mane kach nikach |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who accepts the Will of the Lord is His devotee. Without accepting it, he is the falsest of the false. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਥਾਉ ਕੁਥਾਉ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਉਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: oe thaau kuthaau na jaananee un antar lobh vikaar |
lines.english: They do not understand right places and wrong places; they are filled with greed and corruption.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਬੋਲਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਓਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bol na jaananee onaa andar kaam krodh ahankaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not know what they are saying. They are filled with sexual desire, anger and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਆਪਣੈ ਸੁਆਇ ਆਇ ਬਹਿ ਗਲਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਓਨਾ ਮਾਰੇ ਜਮੁ ਜੰਦਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: oe aapanai suaae aae beh galaa kareh onaa maare jam jandaar |
lines.english: They come, and sit and talk for their own purposes. The Messenger of Death strikes them down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਦਰਗਹ ਲੇਖੈ ਮੰਗਿਐ ਮਾਰਿ ਖੁਆਰੁ ਕੀਚਹਿ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: agai daragah lekhai mangiai maar khuaar keecheh koorriaar |
lines.english: Hereafter, they are called to account in the Court of the Lord; the false ones are struck down and humiliated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਕੂੜੈ ਕੀ ਮਲੁ ਕਿਉ ਉਤਰੈ ਕੋਈ ਕਢਹੁ ਇਹੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eeh koorrai kee mal kiau utarai koee kadtahu ihu veechaar |
lines.english: How can this filth of falsehood be washed off? Can anyone think about this, and find the way?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੇ ਨਾਮੋ ਆਰਾਧੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਕਰਹੁ ਸਭਿ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naam jape naamo aaraadhe tis jan kau karahu sabh namasakaar |
lines.english: Let all bow in humility to that humble being who chants the Naam, and worships the Naam in adoration.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਿੜਾਏ ਸਭਿ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਕਟਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur milai taa naam dirraae sabh kilavikh kattanahaar |
lines.english: If one meets with the True Guru, He implants the Naam, the Name of the Lord within; all his sins are destroyed.
